archive_data.question_text: The sale of car results in __________.

options.text: decrease in sale of final products

explanation.english: The sale of a car is a transaction of a final good, which contributes to the GDP of the country. Therefore, it results in an increase in GDP.
explanation.tanglish: Oru car vikravathu oru mudivana porul viyapaaram. Idhu GDP velaiyiyalil kootappadum endru artham, adhanal GDP valarchiyil eeru padugirathu.

archive_data.question_text: As of October 2022, fire altars are primarily found in which of the following Harappan cities?

explanation.english: Fire altars have been discovered at Kalibangan, which is an important site of the Harappan civilization providing evidence of ritualistic fire worship.
explanation.tanglish: Kalibangan matra Harappan nagara theevugalil sudaradangal (fire altars) kandupidikkappattullana. Idhu aanmiga vazhipadu muraiyai kaatugirathu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following will NOT be included in the estimation of national income? (i) Expenses on electricity by a factory (ii) Financial help to earthquake victims (iii) Imputed value of production for self-consumption (iv) Brokerage on sale of bonds

explanation.english: Expenses on electricity by a factory represent intermediate consumption, and financial help to earthquake victims is a transfer payment. Neither intermediate consumption nor transfer payments are included in the estimation of national income.
explanation.tanglish: Factoryilirundhu min sevaiyai vangugira nagai madhiyaal athanbu seyyappadum, bhukampathin kodi网路kku tharapatra selvagal. Indha rendum yer moola aththanaiyil serkkappadathu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following is the hardest mineral?

explanation.english: Diamond is the hardest known natural mineral with a Mohs hardness of 10, while talc is the softest with a hardness of 1.
explanation.tanglish: Vairam (Diamond) sirithala kanithu sedhi, Mohs kattrchiyil 10 endra kadamaiyil irukkum.

archive_data.question_text: In which year was the city of Agra founded?

explanation.english: The city of Agra was founded by Sultan Sikandar Lodi of the Delhi Sultanate in the year 1504.
explanation.tanglish: Agra nagaram Delhi Sultan Sikandar Lodi alavathil 1504 aandil sthapikkappattathu.
